Animal Embryo−Editing Experiments are Rarely Approved

The varied agricultural applications of animal gene-editing are often impeded by

stringent country-to-country regulation.

Cloned cell line

Embryo edit

Japan

Brazil

Argentina

United States

Dominican Republic

Regulatory Approval?

Colombia

Yes

No

Canada

or

Uruguay

United Kingdom

Taiwan

South Korea

Singapore

Russia

Norway

New Zealand

Israel

Germany

Data sourced from ISAAA — all

CRISPR and TALEN-edited

animals from 2011-2023.

Czech Republic

China

Australia
